generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder directly mounted on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor, providing motor shaft position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located after the cycloidal gearbox, providing gear output position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor input current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the output angle of the axis (r_out)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (Data transmitted)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance OutputAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data items
instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft position (raw encoder counts)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox output position (raw encoder counts)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor input current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured axis output angle r_out."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from current and motor parameters."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity calculated from successive position measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration calculated from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLAxisStructureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing the axis structure and ports."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model using Coulomb‑Viscous formulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelStribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model using Stribeck formulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelDahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model using Dahl formulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model using LuGre formulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling live streaming of measurement data from the robot to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService,
                     RealTimeDataComparisonService,
                     ModelBasedControlImprovementService,
                     InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment used for simulation and friction‑parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService,
                     RealTimeDataComparisonService,
                     ModelBasedControlImprovementService
]

instance WebDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for interactive visualization of measured and simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously identifies static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters of the gearbox using live measurement data."
    DTDFVocab:provides GearboxFrictionParametersInsight,
                     UpdateControllerFrictionModelAction
]

instance RealTimeDataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs real‑time comparison of simulated versus measured torque, velocity and acceleration data."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataDivergenceAlertInsight,
                     GenerateDivergenceAlertAction
]

instance ModelBasedControlImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Improves robot controller accuracy by updating friction model parameters derived from the identification service."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControllerFrictionModelAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides interactive visualization of measurement data, simulation results and derived insights in a unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance GearboxFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) for the gearbox."
]

instance DataDivergenceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated when simulated and measured data diverge beyond a defined threshold."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified view of measured and simulated data with highlighted friction parameters and alerts."
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateControllerFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates the robot controller with newly identified friction model parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GenerateDivergenceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates an operator alert when data divergence exceeds the threshold."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow follows the one‑way data‑flow definition of a digital shadow and does not send control commands back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time (continuous) operation‑time scale: data are acquired and processed continuously during robot operation to enable online friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow consisting of DataTraces and DataPoints linked to Sources (sensors or derived data), a Processing component that consumes input traces and runs simulation models, and an Asset representation (MABI robot first axis). The components are orchestrated via MQTT and presented in a dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin (shadow) integrates engineering models (design stage) and runtime data (operational stage) to support continuous model refinement during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each DataPoint to its originating sensor and processing model, continuous re‑identification of white‑box and black‑box friction parameters to maintain model fidelity, and validation by comparing simulated frictionless behavior with measured data to detect deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Live data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol over an IoT network. The MQTT topics carry current, angle, and derived quantities."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS), a recognized Industry 4.0 standard for asset description and integration, and adherence to MBSE guidelines (SysML, RFLP, etc.)."
]
